title: UK spy chief: Time is running out for the West to confront threats from Russia and China
summary_full: Britain and its allies face a “moment of consequence,” according to the head of its intelligence agency.
summary_public: Britain and its allies face a “moment of consequence,” according to the head of its intelligence agency.

GB.label: negative
GB.evidence: Time is running out for the West to confront threats from Russia
